description: Local NLLB translation for 200+ languages. Zero cloud, zero cost, runs entirely on your machine.
name: io.github.damoqiongqiu/mcp-local-translate

environmentVariables.description: HuggingFace endpoint override for downloading models (e.g. https://hf-mirror.com for China).
environmentVariables.name: HF_ENDPOINT

environmentVariables.description: Auto-detect HuggingFace mirror for China. Set to '0' or 'false' to disable.
environmentVariables.name: HF_AUTO_MIRROR

environmentVariables.description: Directory where Transformers.js models are cached (defaults to ./models/).
environmentVariables.name: CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Execution device: 'cpu' (default) or 'webgpu' for GPU acceleration.
environmentVariables.name: TRANSLATE_DEVICE

environmentVariables.description: Proxy URL for model downloads. Also supports HTTP_PROXY and lowercase variants.
environmentVariables.name: HTTPS_PROXY
